abstract: Multifunctional coupling and signal decoupling achieved through nanostructure and supramolecule design, enable multimodal mechanoluminescent materials to play an increasingly important role in interdisciplinary applications and cutting-edge fields.

title: Impact of bottom electrode materials on the crystallographic orientation and ferroelectric performance of Al 0.8 Sc 0.2 N thin films
abstract: Al 0.8 Sc 0.2 N films exhibit substrate-dependent microstructures yet follow a unified polarization switching mechanism. The ferroelectric nucleation mechanism at a single interface is provided and emphasizes the role of the interface in nucleation.

title: Stable Ni( ii )-based metal–organic framework nanoparticles for efficient photocatalytic C–N coupling reaction
abstract: We have successfully synthesized a two-dimensional (2D) Ni( ii ) metal–organic framework called [Ni 2 (L)(H 2 O) 8 ] n (JYU-1). Single crystal analysis showed the layers stack in an ABAB pattern.

title: Unraveling spin–orbit torque-induced multistate magnetization switching in Co/Gd ferrimagnetic multilayers for physically unclonable functions
abstract: Ferrimagnetic materials driven by spin–orbit torque (SOT) exhibit a distinctive characteristic of multistate magnetization switching and enable versatile applications.

title: Protein–surface interactions in nano-scale biosensors for IL-6 detection using functional monolayers
abstract: A multiscale computational approach is employed to investigate the interaction dynamics between Interleukin-6, a key cancer biomarker, and alkyl-functionalized surfaces, with results benchmarked against SPR experiments to provide critical insights for guiding biosensor design.

title: Harnessing sonochemistry in MnCoP 2 O 7 as trifunctional electrodes for symmetric supercapacitor and electrochemical water splitting applications
abstract: The synthesized MnCoP 2 O 7 shows an excellent charge storage behaviour and enhanced water splitting catalytic activity in alkaline medium.

title: Theoretical prediction of stress-tunable optoelectronic properties of GaSeI: a novel 1D helical van der Waals crystal
abstract: One-dimensional (1D) van der Waals materials demonstrate exceptional application potential due to their unique electronic and mechanical properties.

title: Effects of Néel and Brownian relaxations on dynamic magnetization empirically characterized in single-core and multicore structures of magnetic nanoparticles
abstract: Based on the experimentally estimated magnetic relaxation time over a wide time range, the models of the magnetization dynamics were discussed.

title: Catalase enzyme-modified carbon quantum dot nanoparticles with hypoxia alleviation associated with indocyanine green for synchronous augmented photodynamic therapy and cell imaging of melanoma
abstract: The preparation of CAT-ICG@CQD as a novel nanoplatform for ameliorating tumor hypoxia was demonstrated, and it meets the demands of melanoma PDT based on the high efficiency of ROS generation and cell imaging capabilities.

title: Recent advances in the application of carbon materials in all-solid-state batteries
abstract: This review systematically summarizes recent advancements in the application of carbon materials in all-solid-state batteries, including their role in building transport channels, enhancing mechanical properties and improving interface stability.

title: Advancing diagnostics with BODIPY-bismuthene DNA biosensors
abstract: In this work, an electrochemical biosensor is prepared based on few-layer bismuthene hexagons (FLBHs) and a water-soluble BODIPY (BDP) derivative (BDP-NaSO 3 ) for early infection diagnosis.

title: Mechanistic insights into the synergistic antimicrobial activity of nanodelivered sodium polysulfide as a sustainable strategy to combat Xanthomonas pathogens
abstract: This work elucidates the interactions between nano-magnesium hydroxide and sodium polysulfide and determines the ramifications on their antimicrobial activity. The findings suggest this is a promising strategy for combating bacterial plant pathogens.

title: Rubidium intercalation in epitaxial monolayer graphene
abstract: Discovery of 2D Rb-ordered interlayers between monolayer graphene and the buffer layer on SiC(0001): a multi-technique study on morphology, properties, and stability.

title: Microbe-mediated synthesis of defect-rich CeO 2 nanoparticles with oxidase-like activity for colorimetric detection of l -penicillamine and glutathione
abstract: Small-sized graphite-coated CeO 2 NPs with multi-defective structures and desirable oxidase-like activity were synthesized by an eco-friendly, simple, and sustainable method.

title: Nonlinear photonics in glass systems doped with quantum dots and plasmonic nanoparticles
abstract: This review highlights the recent advances in engineering glass systems doped with quantum dots and plasmonic nanoparticles for nonlinear photonics, focusing on their application in optical switching for pulse laser generation.

title: Interplay between the shape anisotropy and optical properties of Cu- and Ag-based ternary and quaternary chalcogenide nanocrystals
abstract: This review highlights the development of ternary and quaternary Cu- and Ag-based chalcogenide NCs with anisotropic shapes: synthesis methods, spectral properties, including chiroptical, energy level structure and potential applications.

title: Modulation anisotropy of nanomaterials toward monolithic integrated polarization-sensitive photodetectors
abstract: This review provides an overview of linear, circular, and full-Stokes photodetectors, discussing how to simplify their design from complex to simple. Images by permission of: RSC 2021, WLY 2023, Optica Publishing Group 2016 and ACS 2020.

title: Discotic amphiphilic supramolecular polymers for drug release and cell activation with light
abstract: The limited efficacy shown by drug delivery systems so far prompts the development of new molecular approaches for releasing drugs in a controlled and selective manner.

title: Self-assembled amino acid-based copolymer nanoparticles for wound healing and tissue regeneration: structure studied through molecular dynamic simulation
abstract: Self-assembled p(NAG- co -NAPA) wc copolymer nanoparticle formed by physical cross-linking and confirmed through MD simulation. This copolymer showed effective regenerative property for wound healing without using any biomolecules or cells.

title: Occupational exposure to graphene-related materials: from workplace emissions to health risk assessment
abstract: Graphene-related material (GRM) powders may pose health risks without adequate protection for workers. This study characterises airborne GRM emissions, exposures, and the associated health risks in workplaces and future industrial scenarios.

title: Strong blue-light emission in flexible branched nanowire-on-nanowire pristine ZnO nanoarchitectures constructed via tandem multiprong growth
abstract: Flexible branched NW-on-NW pristine ZnO nanoarchitectures with a spider-plant-like structure were formed via multiprong vapor–solid growth and show blue-light emission via a hierarchical photonic chain reaction mechanism.

title: From synthesis to chiroptical activities: advancements in circularly polarized luminescent inorganic quantum dots
abstract: Review of synthesis strategies for circularly polarized luminescence (CPL) inorganic quantum dots, influencing factors, theoretical insight into CPL mechanisms, and future applications/prospects. Images reproduced with permission, details in article.

title: A close atomic surface of stainless steel produced by novel green chemical mechanical polishing using silica and lanthana mixed abrasives
abstract: Stainless steel poses machining challenges due to its corrosion and wear resistance.

title: Engineering ZIF-8@Ag core–satellite superstructures through solvent-induced tunable self-assembly for surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy
abstract: A novel method utilizing solvent-induced assembly of Ag NPs onto ZIF-8 to create ZIF-8@Ag core–satellite superstructures for improved SERS. Customizable structures and enhanced performance make it a promising approach for SERS sensors.

title: Asymmetric self-organization from a symmetric film by phase separation
abstract: Self-organization realizes various nanostructures. Conventional self-organization is along the growth direction, resulting in a symmetric nanostructure. Asymmetric self-organization is demonstrated in strain-controlled phase separation.

title: Ambient pressure response of spin defects in two-dimensional materials
abstract: Spin defects in two-dimensional (2D) materials emerge as promising platforms for quantum sensing applications.

title: Biohybrid microrobots with a Spirulina skeleton and MOF skin for efficient organic pollutant adsorption
abstract: Biohybrid microrobot (Spirulina, Fe 3 O 4 , ZIF-8) rapidly adsorbs organic pollutants and navigates narrow gaps directionally via magnetic steering.

title: Effectively modulating hydrophobicity and surface nanobubble distribution on graphene through uniaxial compressive strain
abstract: Cross-linking uniaxially compressed graphene with unstrained graphene as the substrate structure can effectively regulate the surface gas distribution.

title: Asymmetric thiol-modified hybrid polyoxometalates: building blocks for hierarchical nanostructured redox materials
abstract: Asymmetric functionalisation of polyoxometalates with tailored functionality yields stimuli-responsive, redox-active molecules that can form soft assemblies or graft onto nano- and macroscale surfaces.

title: Small but mighty: nanoemulsion particle size dictates bone regeneration potential of FTY720
abstract: Ultrasound-synthesized nanocarriers demonstrate superior performance in bone regeneration compared to their larger counterparts. This highlights the advantages of this approach: smaller particle size, reduced viscosity, and accelerated drug release.

title: Multi-head spatial atomic layer deposition: a robust approach for precise doping and nanolaminate fabrication in open-air environments
abstract: Multi-head SALD enables the deposition of sharp nanolaminate layers under ambient conditions by isolating precursors, preventing intermixing, and enabling precise control of thickness for scalable, high-throughput multilayer film production.

title: Improvement of growth and lipid accumulation in microalgae with aggregation-induced emission-based nanomaterials towards sustainable lipid production
abstract: Using an aggregation-induced emission-based nanomaterial, TPA-A, for increased biomass and lipid production in microalgae toward sustainability.

title: Reduced graphene oxide/ZnO nanocomposites: one-step solid-state preparation for room temperature photo-sensing and photoelectrical gas sensing capabilities
abstract: Detecting triethylamine (TEA), which is a highly active industrial chemical, is crucial in today's globalized world with increasing air pollution.

title: Dual-function electrodes for photo-rechargeable batteries: mechanisms, designs, and applications
abstract: Photo-rechargeable batteries emerge as an integrated solution for simultaneous solar energy harvesting and storage.

title: α-Hydroxyalkynyl-protected copper( i ) acetelyenediide nanoclusters with anion-dependent photoluminescence
abstract: α-Hydroxyalkynes are highly applicable in achieving alkynyl-protected metal acetelyenediide clusters in a two birds, one stone manner.

title: Correction: Broadening spectral responses and achieving environmental stability in SnS 2 /Ag-NPs/HfO 2 flexible phototransistors
abstract: Correction for ‘Broadening spectral responses and achieving environmental stability in SnS 2 /Ag-NPs/HfO 2 flexible phototransistors’ by Muhammad Farooq Khan et al. , Nanoscale , 2024, 16 , 3622–3630, https://doi.org/10.1039/D3NR04626E.

title: Correction: WS 2 nanosheet as a new photosensitizer carrier for combined photodynamic and photothermal therapy of cancer cells
abstract: Correction for ‘WS 2 nanosheet as a new photosensitizer carrier for combined photodynamic and photothermal therapy of cancer cells’ by Yuan Yong et al. , Nanoscale , 2014, 6 , 10394–10403, https://doi.org/10.1039/C4NR02453B.

title: Valence-engineering modulation of MoS 2 clusters for enhancing biocatalytic activity
abstract: We develop ultra-small and water-soluble MoS 2 clusters with superior antioxidant activity and enzyme-like activity via valence-engineering modulation with Ce doping.

title: Bionic strategy-based design of chirality-dependent activity Cu-Trp nanozymes: tight orchestration of the chronic refractory wound healing phase
abstract: Cu-Trp ( l ) effectively eliminates bacterial infections and reactive oxygen species (ROS) in chronic refractory wounds, while regulating the immune response to promote healing.

title: Tailoring coordinated water in sodium-rich phase for high-performance Prussian blue cathodes
abstract: Triple-solution coprecipitation yields sodium-rich monoclinic PBA; partial coordinated water removal and Na + /N − interactions bend Fe–CN–Fe linkages, synergistically enhancing capacity, rate, and cycling stability.

title: Recent advances in the fundamentals and in situ characterizations for mechanics in 2D materials
abstract: This review involves advances in the mechanics of 2D materials, including measurement methods, sample transfer, materials design, and mechanisms covering the impact of defects and thickness for highly-bendable 2D materials.

title: Symmetry breaking in a WS 2 /Te heterostructure with enhanced second-harmonic generation and strong anisotropic optical properties
abstract: Anisotropic van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures are crucial for smart optoelectronic device development.

title: Twist angle dependent high degree of anisotropic emission and phonon scattering in WS 2 /NbOCl 2 heterostructures
abstract: van der Waals (vdWs) heterostructures provide a superior platform to combine different low-dimensional materials together to tune their physical properties for different types of applications.

title: Identification of DYRK1b as a novel regulator of small extracellular vesicle release using a high throughput nanoscale flow cytometry screening platform
abstract: A high-throughput screening platform for the identification of regulators of extracellular vesicle production. The method collects EVs without additional processing steps and analysis is perfomed directly by nanoscale flow cytometry.

title: Multi-crosslinked strong, tough and anti-freezing organohydrogels for flexible sensors
abstract: The schematic drawings of temperature are replaced by our own artworks and now we confirm that all of the artwork used in the image is our own.

title: Mn-doped WSe 2 as an efficient electrocatalyst for hydrogen production and as anode material for lithium-ion batteries
abstract: Using a simple method, we synthesized Mn-doped WSe 2 , which exhibited outstanding electrocatalytic activity for hydrogen evolution and promising performance as anode material for lithium-ion batteries.

title: Effects of static electric field and temperature on the dynamic dielectric responses of mixed oil-based and bilayer-stabilised magnetic fluids
abstract: Dissipation factor as a function of frequency for NF 4323, NF 4325, and NF 4328 magnetic fluids.

title: Growing and nanomanipulating heterostructures of α-bismuthene in a nearly isolated state
abstract: α-Bismuthene heterostructures, which demonstrate one of the weakest couplings between adjacent materials, are grown in situ under ultrahigh vacuum (UHV) conditions and are characterized and nanomanipulated using scanning tunneling microscopy (STM).

title: Atomic spin precession electro-optic modulation detection based on guided mode resonant lithium niobate metasurfaces
abstract: This study presents a compact modulator for developing miniaturized integrated atomic magnetometers, achieving ultrahigh sensitivity measurements of optical rotation angle using optical modulation techniques.

title: Enhancing the optoelectronic properties of SnS via mixed-phase heterostructure engineering
abstract: Intrinsic intralayer electric field induced exciton dynamics in mixed phase SnS/h-BN heterostructure.

title: Strategies for fabricating aligned nano- and microfiber scaffolds: an overview for cell culture applications
abstract: Beyond electrospinning, unconventional fiber-drawing methods enable precise control over fiber alignment, diameter, and spacing. Understanding the manufacturing parameters is key to designing tailored 3D scaffolds optimized for 3D cell cultures.

title: Synthesis of titanium phosphide by thermal ALD based on a novel phosphorus precursor
abstract: Herein, we present for the first time the synthesis of titanium phosphide (Ti x P y ) by thermal ALD based on in-house synthesized Tris(trimethyltin)phosphide (TMT 3 P) combined with titanium tetrachloride (TiCl 4 ) as the P- and Ti-precursor, respectively.

title: 70 wt% SiO 2 -loaded flexible PVDF quasi-solid-state electrolyte membrane for lithium oxygen batteries
abstract: Unique flexible PVDF-based quasi-solid-state electrolytes (QSSEs) with PMMA-modified nanosilica additives were successfully prepared to enhance the safety, energy density, and cycling stability of lithium oxygen batteries (LOBs).

title: Oxygen-terminated Ti 3 C 2 T x MXene via electrophoretic functionalization for electrochemical nitrate reduction to ammonia
abstract: Oxygen-terminated Ti 3 C 2 T x MXene (o-MX) was synthesized via electrophoretic functionalization, exhibiting high NH 3 performance in electrochemical nitrate reduction while effectively suppressing N 2 formation.

title: Synthesis of carbon dots from spent coffee grounds: transforming waste into potential biomedical tools
authors: 'Yingru Zhou', 'Adalberto Camisasca', 'Sofia Dominguez-Gil', 'Michał Bartkowski', 'Keith D. Rochfort', 'Martina Piletti', 'Anita White', 'Dorottya Krizsan', 'Robert O'Connor', 'Susan J. Quinn', 'Daniela Iacopino', 'Alex J. Eustace', 'Silvia Giordani'
abstract: Carbon dots were synthesised from spent coffee grounds via a novel acetone precipitation approach, featuring superior physico-chemical properties for potential biomedical applications. Created in BioRender. Zhou, Y. (2025) https://BioRender.com/m82x982.

title: Nanomotor-mediated drug delivery with efficient blood–brain barrier crossing for active targeting and therapy of glioblastomas: a systematic review
abstract: Chemotactic nanomotors, bubble-driving nanomotors, photothermal nanomotors, and dual-powered nanomotors, provide superior cellular uptake, BBB crossing, and deep tumor penetration, thus specifically targeting and treating glioblastoma.

title: Defect passivation engineering of chalcogenide quantum dots via in situ fluorination treatment
abstract: Efficient carrier transport through reducing the traps in chalcogenide quantum dots (QDs) is crucial for their application in optoelectronic devices.

title: Triple-action amyloid lysozyme-coated magnetic nanospheres for highly efficient reduction and removal of Cr( vi ) from environmental water
abstract: Using a triple-action strategy, we have designed a highly efficient Cr( vi ) adsorbent with high adsorption and reduction rates for efficient adsorption and removal of Cr( vi ) in environmental water.

title: Selective enhancement of graphene ammonia sensing by electrochemical palladium nanoparticle decoration: ab initio insights into the sensing response
abstract: A simple and cost-efficient approach has been proposed for the decoration of graphene with the aim of enhancing its gas sensing performance.

title: Electrocatalytic nitrogen reduction: mechanisms, system-level optimization, and future perspectives
abstract: We summarize the current state of eNRR technology, mechanisms, and potential optimization strategies, providing inspiring guidance for the eNRR.

title: Preceramic polymer-hybridized phenolic aerogels and the derived ZrC/SiC/C ceramic aerogels with ultrafine nanocrystallines
abstract: This work provides a facile approach to fabricate hybrid phenolic aerogels and derived ZrC/SiC/C ceramic aerogels, which target on applications for extreme environments in aerospace field.

title: Amorphous FeP@porous carbon nanofibers with sterically conductive networks for stable potassium-ion storage
abstract: Amorphous FeP can achieve isotropic volumetric expansion, evenly distribute electrode stress, and alleviate performance degradation during cycling and the interconnected three-dimensional conductive framework enhance the kinetic performance.

title: A novel Janus nanomachine based on mesoporous silica nanoparticles anisotropically modified with PAMAM dendrimers for enzyme-controlled drug delivery
abstract: A masking/toposelective modification approach was employed to prepare a new organic–inorganic Janus nanomaterial by attaching ethylenediamine core polyamidoamine G-4.5 dendrimers to a defined face of mesoporous silica nanoparticles.

title: Exploring optimal in situ fabrication conditions to realize core–shell CsPbBr 3 QDs with high PLQYs and structural stability by dual-defect passivation
abstract: Core–shell CsPbBr 3 QDs with high structural stability and excellent optical properties were developed through dual-defect passivation, with simultaneous application of in situ thiol ligand passivation and a core–shell structure.

title: Single atom coordination in a manganese–cobalt bi-metallic framework on graphene: geometric and electronic structures
abstract: Geometric structure and oxidation states can be tuned upon tetra-coordination of single Mn and Co metal atoms within a porphyrin-based network on graphene.

title: Mechanical modulation of 2D transition metal dichalcogenide alloys
abstract: We developed a process to build suspended Mo 1− x W x S 2 nano-drumheads using a diffusion-based alloying process and investigated their mechanics via experiments and theoretical simulations.

title: Passive nanorheological tool to characterise hydrogels
abstract: Passive nanorheological tool based on real-time label-free nanoprobe tracking with light microscopy, for the characterisation of the local dynamic properties of hydrogels, including during phase transitions. (Figure created with BioRender).

title: An integrated multimethod approach for size-specific assessment of potentially toxic element adsorption onto micro- and nanoplastics: implications for environmental risk
abstract: AF4-MALS-ICP-MS enables size-resolved characterisation of potentially toxic elements (PTEs) adsorption onto COOH-functionalised polystyrene nanoplastics (COOH-PSNPs), revealing the distribution of PTEs across distinct nanoplastics size fractions.

title: Tip-induced nanoscale engineering of surface potential and conductivity in GeSn alloys
abstract: AFM tip-induced electric fields enable permanent and localized modification of surface potential and conductivity in GeSn films, revealing new routes for nanoscale device prototyping.

title: Molecular additive-driven control of Cu/Cu 2 O nanoparticle growth on mesoporous silica for enhanced photocatalytic hydrogen production
abstract: Phase-controlled synthesis of Cu/Cu 2 O nanoparticles on mesoporous SiO 2 using molecular additives to prevent aggregation and control surface interactions for enhanced visible light-driven hydrogen production.

title: Transferable ultrasmooth gold films prepared via the masking method
abstract: Gold thin films play a vital role in a wide range of applications due to their outstanding electrical conductivity, chemical stability, and unique optical properties.

title: Ultra-low thermal conductivity induced by significant anharmonic phonon scattering in two-dimensional graphitic metal (Sb and Bi) carbides
abstract: Significant reduction of thermal conductivity caused by four-phonon scattering in 2D metal carbides (2D g-MCs).

title: Outstanding Reviewers for Nanoscale in 2024
abstract: We would like to take this opportunity to highlight the Outstanding Reviewers for Nanoscale in 2024, as selected by the editorial team for their significant contribution to the journal.

title: Graphene oxide-intercalated PVDF nanofibers as a novel piezo separator for self-charging supercapacitors
abstract: Graphene oxide-intercalated PVDF nanofibers fabricated via a layer-by-layer wet electrospinning approach exhibit an enhanced β-phase content and piezoelectric coefficient, enabling efficient self-charging supercapacitors for wearable electronics.

title: Studying the effect of dimensions and spacer ligands on the optical properties of 2D lead iodide perovskites
abstract: This study explores 2D lead iodide perovskites with varying spacer chains, comparing bulk poly-crystals, colloidal nanoplatelets, and thin films. Their optical properties mainly depend on structural distortion and the bulk-to-surface ratio.

title: Construction of fibrin-targeted nanoparticles for imaging diagnosis and treatment of arterial thrombosis
abstract: A schematic diagram of the preparation of LK/PDB/IR820-CREKA NPs and their application to image the embolized vessel and exert thrombolytic effects in a mouse model of FeCl 3 -induced carotid thrombosis. Created in BioRender. Liu, Y. (2025).

title: Entirely nitrate-free synthesis of silver nanoparticles via electrochemical synthesis–chemical reduction
abstract: We present for the first time the synthesis of silver nanoparticles from metallic silver in an acetate system via electrochemical synthesis–chemical reduction. Silver nanoparticles with multi-morphologies were synthesized without the use of nitrate.

title: Introduction to metal nanoclusters
abstract: Sukhendu Mandal, Di Sun, Yuichi Negishi and Anindita Das introduce the Nanoscale themed collection on metal nanoclusters.

title: Advancing transistor-based point-of-care (POC) biosensors: additive manufacturing technologies and device integration strategies for real-life sensing
abstract: Overview of additive manufacturing technologies and potential device integration strategies.

title: Nonlinear optical properties of stable Cs-doped FAPbBr 3 core@shell layered perovskite nanocrystals: superior temperature sensing and flexible fiber-based pure green LEDs
abstract: Cs-doping and encapsulation with layered perovskites in FAPbBr 3 NCs significantly improve emission, stability, and higher-order nonlinear properties. The NCs were embedded in PMMA microfibers for flexible down-converted G-LEDs.

title: Ultrafast broadband spectroscopy of widely spread excitonic features in WSe 2 nanosheets
abstract: Pauli blocking at the band-edge valley reduces the recombination rate of high-energy excitons in WSe 2 , enhancing its potential as an exceptional optoelectronic material.

title: Constructing vertically aligned Li + transport pathways in a flexible solid polymer composite electrolyte by a soft template approach
abstract: We first synthesized vertically aligned Li 0.5 La 0.5 TiO 3 (LLTO) nano-arrays via a sol–gel-template method, offering a novel approach to significantly enhance lithium-ion conductivity and stability in composite polymer electrolytes.

title: Ionic liquid-functionalized reduced graphene oxide–aramid nanofiber composite films for enhanced thermal conductivity, electromagnetic interference shielding, and mechanical properties
abstract: Ionic liquid-functionalized reduced graphene oxide (rGO) was incorporated into aramid nanofibers (ANFs) to fabricate lightweight, flexible composite films with exceptional thermal conductivity and electromagnetic interference (EMI) shielding properties.

title: Oxygen vacancy-enriched SnO 2 /NiO n–p heterointerfaces for high-efficiency oxygen evolution reaction catalysis
abstract: Integrating electrospinning with post-calcination-mediated interfacial engineering has been developed to construct SnO 2 /NiO n–p junction hollow nanotube heterostructures, enabling efficient OER electrocatalysis in alkaline environments.

title: Optical label-free microscopy characterization of dielectric nanoparticles
abstract: Different optical microscopy methods provide different but related single particle information. This tutorial reviews how optical microscopy images can be related to particle properties, including optical theory and strategies for image analysis.

title: The design and construction of a Co(OH) 2 @NiFe-MIL/NFF heterostructure catalyst for efficient and ultrastable water oxidation
abstract: A novel heterostructured electrocatalyst was successfully constructed and possessed excellent catalytic activity and competitive stability owing to fine-tuning the electronic structure and the synergistic coupling of multi-metallic centers.

title: Nonlinear optics of graphitic carbon allotropes: from 0D to 3D
abstract: The dimensionality of materials fundamentally influences their electronic and optical properties, presenting a complex interplay with nonlinear optical (NLO) characteristics that remains largely unexplored.

title: Design and application of proton gradient-based pH-responsive nanomaterials in the tumor microenvironment
abstract: The five nanoparticles target the tumor acidic microenvironment through the mechanism of (1) ionizable groups and (2) pH-sensitive chemical bonds.

title: Interfacial electronic modulation in heterostructured OER electrocatalysts: a review
abstract: Heterostructured OER electrocatalysts overcome kinetic limits via interfacial electronic redistribution, optimizing intermediate adsorption. This review examines their design, mechanisms, advantages, and challenges for sustainable energy conversion.

title: Shape and size-dependent surface plasmonic resonances of liquid metal alloy (EGaIn) nanoparticles
abstract: Liquid metal (LM) nanoparticles display tunable plasmon resonances across UV–NIR due to their liquid-like deformability. Their reconfigurable optical properties unlock new opportunities in biosensing, nanophotonics, and adaptive plasmonic devices.

title: Terahertz biomedical imaging using a terahertz emitter based on InAs nanowires
abstract: Terahertz imaging in biomedical diagnostics using a low-cost terahertz emitter based on InAs nanowires on a Si(111) substrate.

title: Quantum dot-infused nanocomposites: revolutionizing diagnostic sensitivity
abstract: Quantum dot-based nanocomposites offer enhanced biocompatibility, tunable emission, and multiplex detection, enabling early diagnosis through advanced imaging and signal amplification.

title: Advancing electrocatalytic CO 2 reduction: key strategies for scaling up to industrial applications
abstract: This review explores recent advances in catalyst design, reactor configuration, system optimization, and mechanistic insights to drive CO 2 electrolysis technology toward large-scale and commercial applications.

title: Quasi-BIC-enhanced integrated sensing dielectric metasurfaces for molecular fingerprint retrieval and chiral detection
abstract: Integrated sensing dielectric metasurfaces with quasi-BIC resonances enhance optical chirality, enabling surface-enhanced infrared absorption and circular dichroism sensing.

title: From nature to nanotechnology: the synergistic integration of biomimetic nanomaterials and conductive hydrogels for next-generation applications
abstract: Biomimetic nanomaterials (0D, 1D, and 2D nanomaterials) for the functional design and applications of double-network conductive hydrogels. Images adapted from Servier Medical Art (https://smart.servier.com/), licensed under CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

title: A PDMS@Fe 3 O 4 nanocomposite material-based solar interfacial evaporator prepared using a picosecond laser
abstract: The LT-PDMS@Fe 3 O 4 interfacial evaporator will heat the water in contact with it, causing the water to evaporate and rise through the escape holes.

title: Nanocluster reaction-driven in situ transformation of colloidal nanoparticles to mesostructures
abstract: A one-pot method for creating self-assembled Au–Ag bimetallic mesostructures using a reaction between atomically precise gold nanoclusters and plasmonic silver nanoparticles.

title: A green carbon dot@silver nanoparticle hybrid: as a turn-on fluorescent probe for the detection and quantification of cholesterol and glucose
abstract: Cholesterol and glucose are two important biomarkers that are linked to different human diseases. CD@AgNP hybrid nanostructure was used as turn-on probe for detection of these biomarkers.

title: Defect engineering in OH-functionalized carbon nanotubes for visible-light-driven ROS-mediated anticancer therapy and high-performance photocatalysis
abstract: Carbon nanotube (CNT)-based therapies are emerging as powerful tools in oncology due to their ability to selectively target cancer cells while minimizing damage to healthy tissues.

title: The electrocatalytic hydrogen evolution reaction using a heteroatom-doped hollow onion-like fullerene across a wide pH range
abstract: Glucose and Sulphanilamide derived h-OLF exhibits prominent HER activity in acidic non-aqueous electrolytic media. Specifically, the enhanced HER performance of h-OLF is attributed to the large number of H + due to the strong acid dissociation.

title: Perpendicular sheet-like alignment of a self-driven MoS 2 /Si heterostructure for Vis-NIR wavelength detection
abstract: A self-powered heterostructure based on perpendicularly aligned n-MoS 2 /p-Si for Vis-NIR wavelength detection.

title: 2D monolayer electrocatalysts for CO 2 electroreduction
abstract: Through bridging the gap between 2D material and single-atom material, 2D monolayer materials exhibit great potential in CO 2 RR due to their unique structural/electronic properties, high atom utilization and low mass transfer resistance.

title: Using a newly designed porphyrin photocatalyst based on triptycene to emulate natural photosynthesis for regioselective fixation of NAD(P) + to NAD(P)H and synthesis of value-added chemicals
abstract: This work explores a novel porphyrin photocatalyst based on triptycene, designed to replicate natural photosynthesis and facilitate regioselective fixation of NAD(P) + to NAD(P)H and convert organic molecules into value-added chemicals.

title: Royal jelly derived extracellular vesicles modulate microglial nanomechanics and inflammatory responses
abstract: Royal jelly-derived extracellular vesicles counteract inflammation-induced mechanobiological alterations in microglia, restoring their mechanical properties and offering a novel interkingdom approach to modulate neuroinflammation.

title: Silver nanostructure-loaded starch functionalized magnetite (Ag/s-Fe 3 O 4 ) photocatalyst for H 2 O 2 production: experimental and molecular dynamics studies
abstract: The present research investigates photocatalytic H 2 O 2 formation on a composite of Ag and starch-stabilized Fe 3 O 4 (denoted as s-Fe 3 O 4 ) nanoparticles.

title: A machine learning-enhanced gastric cancer diagnostic method based on shell-isolated nanoparticle-enhanced Raman spectroscopy
abstract: Workflow for non-invasive gastric cancer screening using serum SHINERS spectra combined with different machine learning approaches.

title: Electron beam facilitated structural evolution of nano-zincoxide
abstract: In situ TEM revealed knock-on-driven atomic rearrangements and anti-Ostwald ripening between disconnected particles, governed by structural characteristics and crystallinity, demonstrating the constructive role of the e-beam.

title: Cooperative effects in DNA-functionalized polymeric nanoparticles
abstract: This work addresses the fundamental question of how the dense packing of oligonucleotides on the surface of polymeric nanoparticles impacts their capacity to specifically hybridize with complementary sequences.

title: Unravelling chemical heterogeneity and dual emission pathways in graphene quantum dots via single-particle infrared spectroscopy
abstract: Understanding the relationship between the local chemical structure and photoluminescence in graphene quantum dots (GQDs) and nitrogen-functionalized GQDs (N-GQDs) is critical for their advancement in optoelectronics, sensing, and bioimaging.

title: In situ synthesis of an Al and V co-doped TiO 2 NTA interlayer-enhanced PbO 2 composite for efficient zinc electrowinning
abstract: The high overpotential of the oxygen evolution reaction (OER) and the strong corrosion of the anode are the main problems currently faced by the zinc hydrometallurgical process.

title: Harnessing DFT and machine learning for accurate optical gap prediction in conjugated polymers
abstract: Bridging the gap between DFT-calculated and experimental optical gap of conjugated polymers using machine learning, side-chain features, and a modified oligomer model.

title: Advances in precise synthesis of metal nanoclusters and their applications in electrochemical biosensing of disease biomarkers
abstract: Metal nanoclusters as advanced electrode materials to achieve electrochemical biosensing of diverse disease-associated biomarkers.

title: Chitosan-modified polymeric nanoparticles for the nose-to-brain drug delivery of paroxetine: an in vitro and in vivo evaluation
abstract: Chitosan-modified PLGA nanoparticles can increase the therapeutic potential of the paroxetine drug by increasing the targeted delivery through a cellular uptake mechanism. The mucoadhesive polymers enhance drug delivery via the intranasal route.

title: Superparamagnetic nanoparticles as potential drug delivery systems for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy
abstract: This study aims to use superparamagnetic iron oxide nanoparticles (SPIONs), specifically magnetite (Fe 3 O 4 ), to deliver deflazacort (DFZ) and ibuprofen (IBU) to Duchenne muscular dystrophy-affected (DMD).

title: A Ti 3 C 2 T x MXene/alginic acid-derived mesoporous carbon nanocomposite as a potential electrode material for coin-cell asymmetric supercapacitors
abstract: In this study, we demonstrate MXene (Ti 3 C 2 T x )-based coin-cell asymmetric supercapacitor (coin-cell ASC) exhibiting high energy density and high power density along with good capacitance.

title: Synergistic effect of ZnO–ZnFe 2 O 4 heterostructures for enhanced surface catalytic activity in Cr( vi ) reduction, green H 2 generation and CO sensing: an experimental study supported by DFT
abstract: A unified pathway to enhance the various surface catalytic processes by tuning different influencing parameters of ZnO–ZnFe 2 O 4 heterostructure materials to simultaneously overcome environment- and energy-related issues.

title: Study on the importance of uniformity and nanoparticle size in ZIF-8 carbon nanoarchitecture for enhancing electrochemical properties
abstract: This study aimed to assess the effects of the particle size and uniformity of ZIF-8-C on its effectiveness as a nanoporous carbon platform in electrochemical applications.

title: Atomic force microscope-guided nanoscale 3D patterning for carbon nanofibers with in situ Raman spectroscopy
abstract: Direct nanoscale 3D patterning of CNT fibers is achieved using a quartz tuning fork-based atomic force microscope with a nanopipette, with in situ Raman spectroscopy enabling real-time structural monitoring.

title: Synergistically strained PdPr bimetallene: an ethylene glycol sensor for antifreeze leakage detection
abstract: The development of high-performance electrochemical catalysts capable of ultrasensitive detection of small molecules remains a significant challenge.

title: Biomolecular ligands as tools to modulate the optical and chiroptical properties of gold nanoclusters
abstract: This review highlights advances in the use of biomolecular ligands to synthesize gold nanoclusters, factors affecting their optical and chiroptical features, and applications in biosensing, bioimaging, and theranostics.

title: Mechanochemically-mediated dynamic imine bond conjugation for drug delivery using carbon dots
abstract: An aldehyde or ketone containing therapeutic molecule can be covalently functionalized to an amine decorated carbon dot (CD) using mechanochemical approaches such as ball milling.

title: Operando characterization of lithium battery internal temperatures via upconverting nanoparticle thermometry
abstract: Upconverting nanoparticle thermometry enables operando characterization of lithium battery internal temperatures with high temporal and spatial resolution.

title: Electronic and structural coupling of pentacene on NiO(001)
abstract: Despite weak interaction, pentacene molecules on NiO exhibit orbital degeneracy and molecular electron density accumulation at the surface, presenting a promising avenue for optical control of spin dynamics on antiferromagnetic surfaces.

title: Role of the oxide in memristive quasi-1D silicon nanowires
abstract: Memristive behavior exhibits after surface oxidation.

title: Tailoring directional emission of colloidal quantum dots via mode coupling with photonic crystals
abstract: A colloidal quantum dot-embedded photonic crystal exhibits highly directional, narrow-angle emission by phase-matched outcoupling of band-edge Bloch modes into free space, enhancing both spectral and angular selectivity.

title: Diverse applications of DNA origami as a cross-disciplinary tool
abstract: DNA origami provides precise addressable self-assembly templates, demonstrating the tremendous potential of DNA origami technology in promoting interdisciplinary integration and driving technological progress.

title: Pd-based chalcogenides for energy conversion electrocatalysis
abstract: This review systematically summarizes the recent advances in the use of Pd-based chalcogenides as electrocatalysts for energy conversion reactions.

title: Modulation of specific interactions within a viral fusion protein predicted from machine learning blocks membrane fusion
abstract: A machine learning model is developed to rapidly identify a critical residue at the fusion loop, when mutated, the fusion protein completely abrogates membrane fusion.

title: Integration of 2D materials for high-performance perovskite solar cells
abstract: In this mini-review, we reviewed the role played by 2D materials as additives in PSCs and their effects on carrier transport and stability and put forward some prospects for the preparation of high-performance PSCs.

title: Ligand assisted reprecipitation of formamidinium–guanidinium lead iodide 2D perovskite nanowires
abstract: Formamidinium–guanidinium lead iodide nanowires synthesized via ligand-assisted reprecipitation, demonstrating flexible photodetection and enhanced nonlinear optical response.

title: Correction: Micellar nanoparticles inhibit breast cancer and pulmonary metastasis by modulating the recruitment and depletion of myeloid-derived suppressor cells
abstract: Correction for ‘Micellar nanoparticles inhibit breast cancer and pulmonary metastasis by modulating the recruitment and depletion of myeloid-derived suppressor cells’ by Zhengze Lu et al. , Nanoscale , 2022, 14 , 17315–17330, https://doi.org/10.1039/D2NR03880C.

title: Rational design of mixed-valence cobalt-based nanowires via simultaneous vanadium and iron modulations for enhanced alkaline electrochemical water splitting
abstract: Simultaneous dual-cation doping of V and Fe is employed to optimize Co-based nanowires and results in enhanced catalytic activity due to modulated electronic structure and stabilized reaction intermediates over the undoped or single-doped catalysts.

title: Point defects at grain boundaries can create structural instabilities and persistent deep traps in metal halide perovskites
abstract: Perovskite grain boundaries exhibit slow fluctuations and transient charge trap states. Pb interstitials lead to boundary reconstruction and long-lived trap states due to Pb trimers.

title: Tuning the local S coordination environment on Ru single atoms to boost the oxygen evolution reaction
abstract: A single atom Ru-NiS 2 catalyst with a controlled S-coordination environment for OER was prepared by a simple atom capture strategy. Fine-tuned local S coordination environment can optimize the electronic structure of Ru active sites.

title: Field driven evolution of periodic antiferromagnetic skyrmion in non-centrosymmetric semiconducting monolayer
abstract: Evolution of periodic antiferromagnetic skyrmion from chiral strip antiferromagnetic domains under a magnetic field, in a dynamically stable monolayer stabilised under a third nearest-neighbor mediated four-sublattice framework.

title: A novel high-sensitivity electrochemical sensor for cancer cell detection by means of phosphorene functionalized with sialic acid biomolecules
abstract: As recently discovered, sialic acid (SA) plays a crucial role in cell functioning and malignant transformation, and its interaction with malignant cells could be a key parameter in smart and label-free drug delivery.

title: Rice leaves microstructure-inspired high-efficiency electrodes for green hydrogen production
abstract: Rice leaves inspired the development of an anisotropic microstructured gas conduction electrode featuring rapid desorption and transfer of bubbles to achieve highly efficient hydrogen production.

title: Manipulating the interfacial integration mode of a bio-templated porous ZSM-5 platform with an Au/CuZnO x catalyst for enhanced efficiency and recycling stability in glycerol conversion to 1,3-dihydroxyacetone
abstract: A series of metal oxide–zeolite catalysts were synthesized using three integration strategies. The physically milled catalyst showed the highest activity and stability, with glycerol conversion and DHA selectivity above 72% after five cycles.

title: Retrospective perspectives and future trends in nanomedicine treatment: from single membranes to hybrid membranes
abstract: Various types of cell membrane-coated nanoparticles are used to treat various diseases.

title: Transfer printing of perovskite nanocrystal self-assembled monolayers via controlled surface wettability
abstract: Employing viscoelastic stamps and wettability-controlled substrates, transfer printing of LHP NC monolayers were developed. For uniform assembly and multistep transfer, spin-coating substrates were treated with a fluoroalkyl–alkyl silane mixture.

title: 2D MoTe 2 memristors for energy-efficient artificial synapses and neuromorphic applications
abstract: 2D-materials for memristor-based low-power neuromorphic computing.

title: Self-assembled monolayers of mesoionic triazolylidene dimers on Au(111)
abstract: Atomic-scale elucidation of mesoionic carbene monolayers has been achieved, revealing a molecule–adatom–molecule architecture on Au(111).

title: The impact of ferrocenium as a catalyst on the chiral distribution of single-walled carbon nanotubes in floating-catalyst chemical vapor deposition synthesis
abstract: The catalyst charge effect on the chirality of SWCNTs during FC-CVD synthesis.

title: Tailoring defect generation in SnO 2 nanostructures for increased selectivity in electrochemical CO 2 reduction
authors: K. S. S. V. Prasad Reddy
abstract: Vacancy engineered SnO 2 CO 2 RR electrocatalysts synthesized using a template-assisted process.

title: A novel micelleplex for tumour-targeted delivery of CRISPR-Cas9 against KRAS-mutated lung cancer
abstract: CRISPR-Cas9 has emerged as a highly effective and customizable genome editing tool, holding significant promise for the treatment of KRAS mutations in lung cancer.

title: Revisiting the dissolution-recrystallization mechanism of rutile growth from protonated titanate nanotubes
abstract: The dissolution of protonated titanate nanotubes in acid is a key step in the aqueous-phase phase-transition towards rutile TiO 2 .

title: Zn 0.5 Cd 0.5 Se quantum dot-integrated MOF-derived C/N–CeO 2 photocatalyst for enhanced H 2 O 2 production and O 2 evolution reactions
abstract: Zn 0.5 Cd 0.5 Se QD-integrated MOF-derived C/N–CeO 2 photocatalyst for enhanced H 2 O 2 production and O 2 evolution reactions exhibited hierarchy and the desired multi-functionality of a MOF-derived C/N–CeO 2 system. Part of the artwork reproduced with permission from Elsevier, 2021.

title: Mitochondrial damage and reactive oxygen species production in C. elegans : key factors in CdTe/ZnS quantum dot-Cet probes
abstract: Mitochondrial damage and reactive oxygen species production in C. elegans : key factors in CdTe/ZnS quantum dot-Cet probes.

title: Current state and potential of polymersomes as ocular drug delivery systems
abstract: Polymersomes offer tuneable membrane and release traits, with mobility and ability to traverse barriers, making them a promising ocular delivery alternative. Images adapted from Servier Medical Art (https://smart.servier.com/), licensed under CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

title: Extended osteoarthritis pain relief with neosaxitoxin using alginate-core polymeric microparticles
abstract: We developed a sustained release alginate-core polymeric microparticle formulation (NSTX-AlgPLGA-MP) to extend the analgesic effect of Neosaxitoxin (NSTX) for osteoarthritis (OA) pain from hours to approximately one week.

title: Computational modelling of nanoparticle catalysis
abstract: An overview of progress in computational nanocatalysis, including methods for modelling nanoparticle catalysis and computational analysis of their structure and catalytic activity.

title: Immunomodulatory effects of metal nanoparticles: current trends and future prospects
abstract: The unique tuneability of various properties of MNPs and immunomodulatory effects are discussed in this review.

title: Nanoscale high-entropy alloys for solar and thermal applications
abstract: This review highlights the advantages of non-annealing synthesis, emphasizing the importance of in situ characterization, multi-level simulations and machine learning to accelerate photo-/thermocatalytic research in nanoscale high-entropy alloys.

title: The application prospect of metal/metal oxide nanoparticles in the treatment of intervertebral disc degeneration
abstract: This review highlights the therapeutic potential of metal-based and metal oxide nanoparticles in IVDD by leveraging their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and microenvironment-modulating properties to enhance tissue repair. The ToC was created in BioRender. Zhang, L. (2025) https://BioRender.com/6fzd…

title: NIR-II upconversion nanomaterials for biomedical applications
abstract: This review provides a comprehensive overview of recent biomedical applications of upconversion nanomaterials specifically within the near-infrared two-region (NIR-II) window (1000–1700 nm).

title: Designing a pseudocapacitive binary Zn/Mn perovskite fluoride anode with a conversion/alloying/insertion hybrid mechanism for advanced Na-ion capacitors and Na-based dual ion batteries
abstract: Designed a pseudocapacitive KZMF(3-1)@rGO anode material, explored its conversion/alloying/insertion hybrid mechanism by electrochemical analysis and ex situ characterization techniques, and constructed NICs and Na-DIBs devices.

title: Mapping the local stoichiometry in Cu nanoparticles during controlled oxidation by STEM-EELS spectral imaging
abstract: The oxidation of Cu nanoparticles, induced by plasma treatments, can be tracked with nanometric resolution using STEM-EELS spectral maps, which are then analyzed by machine learning algorithms.

title: Advanced flexible supercapacitors: vertical 2D MoS 2 and WS 2 nanowalls on graphenated carbon nanotube cotton
abstract: Flexible supercapacitors (SCs), which are mostly produced from carbon-based materials, are emerging devices for lightweight, portable, miniaturized, and wearable electronic products.

title: High-precision AFM cutting of graphene via improved electrode-free local anodic oxidation for electronic band engineering
abstract: The improved electrode-free localized anodic oxidation (iEFLAO) provides a convenient approach for fabricating high-precision graphene nanostructures and exploring quantum phenomena in carbon materials.

title: Dual-parameter monitoring of HSA and ALT via an albumin-responsive carbon dot fluorescence signal amplification system
abstract: .This work presents a water-soluble red-emissive CDs based label-free assays for HSA detection (LOD: 0.0104 mg mL −1 ) and cellular imaging and ALT sensing (LOD: 0.00137 U mL −1 ).

title: Stacked meshes with super-wettability via atmospheric plasma for efficient emulsion separation
abstract: An efficient emulsion separation strategy has been developed using multilayer stacked nylon meshes treated with atmospheric plasma with super-wettability.

title: Pioneering nucleation for stable ultraviolet-to-deep-blue illuminating two-dimensional perovskite nanoplates by using saturated salt solution
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) (OLM) 2 Cs n −1 Pb n Br 3 n +1 perovskite nanoplates with n = 2 and 3 exhibit bright and tunable violet-to-blue photoluminescence, offering composition-dependent optical properties.

title: Solvation directed morphological control in metal oxide nanostructures
abstract: Nanoscale dipolar interactions modulated by chemical coupling between different solvents and undercoordinated surface atoms direct particle morphology and hierarchy development in solution synthesis.

title: Improved cyclability of high-voltage LiCoO 2 by the coating of medium-entropy nanomaterials
abstract: We proposed a multifunctional surface modification for LCO. Nano-sized rivets of medium-entropy material stabilized LCO surface.Ti enriched at surface induces a stable CEI. La/Zr diffused into lattice suppresses irreversible phase transition.

title: Enhancing the stability of a polycrystalline Ni-rich material upon cycling with an inorganic Li + conductor binder
abstract: Li 3 PO 4 , a Li + conductor binder, improves capacity, cycling performance and critical pressure of a polycrystalline material without sacrificing its rate performance.

title: Facile synthesis of Si/C composites for high-performance lithium-ion battery anodes
abstract: Nanotization and surface coating of silicon (Si) particles are effective methods to mitigate volume expansion and protect the solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) film during charge and discharge cycles.

title: Quantum dot-based memristors for information processing and artificial intelligence applications
abstract: Research and progress in quantum dot memristors.

title: Unique NiCo bimetal boosting 98% CH 4 selectivity and high catalysis stability for photothermal CO 2 hydrogenation
abstract: This paper reveals the synergistic and complementary roles of light and heat in photothermal catalysis on NiCo alloy catalysts. The catalyst exhibits high CH 4 selectivity and catalytic stability in the photothermal CO 2 hydrogenation reaction.

title: Bi 2 Se 3 –PtSe 2 heterostructure ultrabroadband UV-to-THz negative photoconductive photodetectors with wide-temperature-range operation
abstract: By combining the photothermoelectric effect, Joule thermal effect and photoinduced bolometric effect, the fabricated Bi 2 Se 3 –PtSe 2 heterojunction exhibits broad-spectrum UV–THz detection and stable operation in a wide temperature range of 183 K–501 K.

title: Metal–organic framework microneedles for precision transdermal drug delivery: design strategy and therapeutic potential
abstract: This review explores the synergistic potential of MOF-based MNs and details strategies for integrating MOFs and various guest molecules within MOFs into MNs to enhance transdermal therapeutic applications.

title: Nanoscale electron transfer mechanism in metallized polypropylene films
abstract: In this work, we systematically investigated the micro-level electron transfer mechanism and macrolevel electrical characteristics in different MFs, building a relationship between nanoscale electron transfer mechanism and electrical properties.

title: A reconfigurable memristor diode based on a CuInP 2 S 6 /graphene lateral heterojunction
abstract: Our device demonstrates the reconfigurable characteristics of the diode under the control of only lateral voltage, and exhibits memristive behavior; the physical mechanism is due to the variation in barrier height caused by the migration of Cu + ions.

title: Regulating the crystallization behavior of quasi-2D Dion–Jacobson tin perovskites with a non-linear organic spacer
abstract: The strong interaction between non-linear MDAN 2+ and perovskite octahedra induced rapid nucleation and slow growth of tin halide perovskites, promoting the formation of high-quality tin perovskite films and enhancing device performance and stability.

title: Tuning the configuration of Ag–Cu aerogels for electrocatalytic applications
abstract: Ag–Cu metal aerogels exhibiting exceptional electrocatalytic properties were synthesized via micro-turbulence, promoting their distinctive 3D architecture formation through a nonclassical growth mechanism.

title: Serum albumin-coated stellate mesoporous silica nanocomposites inhibit metastatic outgrowth in zebrafish embryos
abstract: Mesoporous silica-based nanoparticles (NPs) are promising tools for developing targeted therapeutic interventions in cancer.

title: ZnO–BaTiO 3 vertically aligned nanocomposite (VAN) thin films with tailorable morphology and functionalities
abstract: ZnO–BaTiO 3 (ZnO–BTO) vertically aligned nanocomposites (VANs) demonstrate property and microstructure tuning through variations in laser frequency and substrate selection.

title: A bionic palladium metal–organic framework based on a fluorescence sensing enhancement mechanism for sensitive detection of phorate
abstract: Palladium-based MOF fluorescent nanoprobes achieve fluorescence enhancement through a mechanism similar to the bioluminescence of Chrysaora pacifica . The linear detection range is from 100 ppb to 0.01 ppb, the detection limit is as low as 0.0017 ppb.

title: Strong enhancement of effective refractive index in structured colloids (TiO 2 @Silica): Localization of light
abstract: A large enhancement of the effective refractive index experienced by Raman photons is demonstrated in a scattering medium comprising spatially-correlated photonic structures of core–shell TiO2@Silica scatterers plus silica NPs suspended in ethanol.

title: Comment on “Two-dimensional honeycomb borophene oxide: strong anisotropy and nodal loop transformation” by C. Zhong, W. Wu, J. He, G. Ding, Y. Liu, D. Li, S. A. Yang and G. Zhang, Nanoscale , 2019, 11 , 2468
abstract: A comparison of our results with those of Zhong et al. shows that neglecting next-nearest-neighbor interactions for the p y orbital leads to significant DOS errors, including failure to capture the van Hove singularity at 0.52 eV.

title: Controlled colloidal synthesis of anisotropic mixed-metal chalcohalides: insights into morphology and phase evolution
abstract: A facile dual injection synthesis protocol enabling precise phase control in the production of mixed metal chalcohalide anisotropic crystals. Sequential transformation of seeds drives formation of the quaternary chalcohalide.

title: Manipulation of trions to enhance the excitonic emission in monolayer p-MoS 2 and its hetero-bilayer by reverse charge injection
abstract: Photoluminescence enhancement in monolayer transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) is achieved through interface engineering with conductive substrates and the formation of heterobilayers.

title: 3D-printed ultrasensitive SERS substrates via photocrosslinked Pluronic F127 micellar hydrogel with citrate-reduced metallic nanoparticles
abstract: Robust and rapid fabrication of SERS substrates by 3D printing technology.

title: Effect of annealing temperature on the properties of CsPbBr 3 nanocrystal films via inkjet printing and its application in colour conversion layers
abstract: Inkjet-printed CsPbBr 3 films transform from 3D cubes to 0D structures to 2D nanosheets via annealing, enabling tunable morphology and vibrant colour conversion layers for next-generation optoelectronic applications.

title: Expression of concern: Iron oxide magnetic nanoparticles with versatile surface functions based on dopamine anchors
abstract: Expression of concern for ‘Iron oxide magnetic nanoparticles with versatile surface functions based on dopamine anchors’ by Mykola Mazur et al. , Nanoscale , 2013, 5 , 2692–2702, https://doi.org/10.1039/C3NR33506B.

title: Correction: Dynamic response of a ferromagnetic nanofilament under rotating fields: effects of flexibility, thermal fluctuations and hydrodynamics
abstract: Correction for ‘Dynamic response of a ferromagnetic nanofilament under rotating fields: effects of flexibility, thermal fluctuations and hydrodynamics’ by Pedro A. Sánchez et al. , Nanoscale , 2024, 16 , 11724–11738, https://doi.org/10.1039/D4NR01034E.

title: Correction: Self-patterning of liquid Field's metal for enhanced performance of two-dimensional semiconductors
abstract: Correction for ‘Self-patterning of liquid Field's metal for enhanced performance of two-dimensional semiconductors’ by Kwanghee Han et al. , Nanoscale , 2025, https://doi.org/10.1039/d4nr03845b.

title: Correction: Self-assembly of DNA G-quadruplex nanowires: a study of the mechanism towards micrometer length
abstract: Correction for ‘Self-assembly of DNA G-quadruplex nanowires: a study of the mechanism towards micrometer length’ by Yiqi Fan et al. , Nanoscale , 2024, 16 , 17964–17973, https://doi.org/10.1039/D4NR02696A.

title: Multifunctional microring structures enabled by SiN for advanced optically pumped atomic technologies
abstract: A silicon nitride microring chip emitter enabling on-chip atomic polarization and laser stabilization, replacing bulk optics for quantum technologies.

title: High-performance supercapacitor electrode of Cu 2 ZnSnS 4 (CZTS) thin films grown by ECD
abstract: In this paper, we studied the capacitive performance of a kesterite Cu 2 ZnSnS 4 (CZTS) electrode grown on an ITO (indium tin oxide) substrate by an electrochemical deposition technique (ECD) at room temperature for the first time.

title: Advances in Mg 3 Sb 2 thermoelectric materials and devices
abstract: Effective strategies such as manipulation of carrier scattering mechanism, introduction of phonon scattering sources, and optimization of interface layer for improving Mg 3 Sb 2 thermoelectric materials and devices are summarized.

title: Room-temperature solution-processed spin organic light-emitting diodes based on chiral 2D halide perovskites
abstract: Chiroptical properties of chiral 2D perovskites with various halide compositions were investigated by CD, CPL, MCD, and MCPL. Spin OLEDs were realized by using chiral 2D perovskite film as the spin-polarized hole transport layer.

title: Impact of solvent and ligand density on the self-assembly and optical properties of metal nanocrystals
abstract: Tuning the ligand density and solvent interactions on Au, Ag, and Pt nanocrystals drives their self-assembly into organized structures, a process that critically modulates the final optical properties of the nanomaterial.

title: Heterostructure interface-engineered 3D/2D CoMn 2 O 4 /CoFe 2 O 4 /NF core/shell Bi-functional electrocatalytic nanomaterials for efficient overall water splitting application in alkaline media
abstract: Developing an innovative, high-performance, cost-effective, reinforced, and stable bi-functional nanocatalyst to advance sustainable energy conversion processes is a key step toward enabling large-scale commercialization.

title: Interface-oriented bridges toward efficient carbon-based perovskite solar cells
abstract: Interface-oriented chemical bridges.

title: Machine learning models for easily obtainable descriptors of the electrocatalytic properties of Ag–Pd–Ir nanoalloys toward the formate oxidation reaction
abstract: By training the overpotential dataset of Ag–Pd–Ir nanocatalysts using machine learning models, the untrained formate oxidation reaction catalyst dataset is predicted using K-nearest neighbors model, screening the best candidate catalysts.

title: Bimodal interfacial charge transfer in quantum dot heterostructures revealed by donor-/acceptor-specific broadband transient absorption spectroscopy
abstract: Dual probe transient absorption allows direct correlation of charge transfer dynamics in quantum dot heterostructures, and reveals bimodal charge injection dynamics.

title: Enhanced solid-state electrochemiluminescence platform for selective sensing of glutathione via finely tuned, thickness dependent graphitic carbon nitride nanosheets
abstract: Finely thickness-tuned g-C 3 N 4 nanosheets engineered via the optimization of the ammonium sulfate-melamine ratio amplifies solid-state ECL, enabling selective glutathione sensing in real human urine samples.

title: On the epitaxial growth in ALD Co 3 O 4 - and NiO-based bilayers
abstract: The work shows that atomic layer deposited hetero-stacks enables controlling the crystalline texture. This provides the opportunity of tuning the atomic arrangement at the surface of thin films on templates relevant for practical applications.

title: Electronic properties and interfacial engineering of metal–semiconductor 1T-, 2H-Ta 2 B MBene/Janus MoSSe heterostructures
abstract: Metal–semiconductor heterostructures are pivotal in modern electronics, offering a crucial interface that governs carrier transport and significantly impacts device performance and functionality.

title: The impact of antimony on all-inorganic lead-free perovskites: progress in optical advancement and applications
abstract: We present a comprehensive overview of the recent progress in the rational design of Sb 3+ and other B III cation doping in Cs 2 B I B III X 6 DPs, along with their remarkable applications in optoelectronic devices.

title: Binder-free V 2 O 5 -carbon nanotube composite films for high-performance aqueous manganese-ion batteries
abstract: The V 2 O 5 -carbon nanotube film demonstrates a combined Mn 2+ and H + ion co-intercalation/extraction mechanism during the electrochemical process of the manganese-ion batteries.

title: Correction: The coexistence of Dirac cones and Fermi arcs in a graphene/WTe 2 heterostructure
abstract: Correction for ‘The coexistence of Dirac cones and Fermi arcs in a graphene/WTe 2 heterostructure’ by Wojciech Ryś et al. , Nanoscale , 2025, https://doi.org/10.1039/D5NR03824C.

title: Fabrication of flexible memristors using PMMA-rGO/Au nanocomposite thin films with improved stability and retention time
abstract: Flexible memristor devices with high retention capability and enhanced stability are fabricated using a cost-effective, low-temperature spin coating technique.

title: Solvothermal synthesis of PtPb nanoparticles with efficient alcohol oxidation performance
abstract: Solvothermal synthesis of PtPb nanoparticles with enhanced electrochemical activity towards EGOR and EOR.

title: Leveraging the dual role of ROS in liver diseases with nanomaterials: clearing and amplifying for therapy
abstract: The dual role of ROS in liver diseases, and the potential of nanomaterials with catalytic activity for therapeutic applications are examined.

title: Engineering the surface of carbon dots for enhanced photoluminescence and controlled plasmonic interactions
abstract: PEG-functionalized Carbon Dots show enhanced photoluminescence upon coupling with positively charged silver/gold nanoparticles via near-field plasmonic interactions, while no effect is observed with negatively charged plasmonic nanoparticles.

title: Smart MXene-based microrobots for targeted drug delivery and synergistic therapies
abstract: This review emphasizes the groundbreaking potential of MXene-based microrobots in developing targeted drug delivery and synergistic therapeutic approaches.

title: Anisotropic photodetection in borophene: exploiting directional optical responses for next-generation polarization-sensitive devices
abstract: Borophene's unique anisotropic structure enables highly sensitive polarization photodetection. This review highlights synthesis, device engineering, and AI-driven optimization for advanced polarization imaging and flexible optoelectronics.

title: Solution-synthesized nanostructured materials with high thermoelectric performance
abstract: Regulation of grain size/morphology, second phase, and ligand in solution synthesis. Reproduced with permission - see article for full details.

title: Stabilization of SERS nanotags by BSA: insights into protein conformational dynamics across pH environments
abstract: The colloidal stability of surface-enhanced Raman scattering (SERS) nanotags is vital for designing SERS-based biosensors with high accuracy and reproducibility.

title: Recent advances in photocatalytic ammonia synthesis: materials design and mechanistic insights
abstract: The state-of-the-art progress in photocatalytic ammonia synthesis is reviewed with a focus on the adsorption activation of nitrogen molecules, electron transfer pathways, and intermediate product regulation strategies.

title: Understanding the interplay between pH and charges for theranostic nanomaterials
abstract: Nanotechnology enables targeted theranostics by enhancing imaging and therapy. This review explores advances in pH-induced charge-switchable nanomaterials, their role in drug delivery and imaging contrast, and future directions in the field.

title: A dual-functional plasmonic W 18 O 49 /rGO heterostructure for ultrasensitive SERS detection and in situ tracking of photocatalytic reactions
abstract: A dual-functional nonmetallic plasmonic W 18 O 49 /rGO heterostructure for ultrasensitive SERS detection and in situ tracking of photocatalytic reactions.

title: Bioactive herbal supramolecular hydrogels with a hierarchical nanofibrillar structure via metal ion mediated co-assembly
abstract: We develop a novel multicomponent supramolecular hydrogel system with excellent mechanical robustness and desirable biological performance constructed from the co-assembly of glycyrrhizic acid (GA) and rhein (Rh) via Zn 2+ modulation.

title: Mg-doped layered vanadates for high-energy zinc anode-based electrochromic devices
abstract: Mg 2+ was doped into vanadates by hydrothermal method to obtain MVO with expanded interlayer spacing, enabling a reversible yellow–green color change while enhancing the energy storage and electrochromic performance of MVO//Zn electrochromic devices.

title: Engineering 2D g-C 3 N 4 for enhanced photocatalytic water purification: the impact of post-processing on activity enhancement
abstract: In recent decades, g-C 3 N 4 has emerged as a potential candidate among the 2D materials for revolutionizing the use of materials in water remediation applications.

title: PFAS self-assembly and adsorption dynamics on graphene: molecular insights into chemical and environmental influences
abstract: This study offers atomistic insights into the adsorption of per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) on graphene, highlighting how the stability of adsorbed PFAS is influenced by fluoroalkyl chain length, headgroup characteristic, and pH condition.

title: Ionic liquid functionalized binary montmorillonite nanomaterials as water-based lubricant additives for steel/steel contact
abstract: Protonic ionic liquid-modified two-dimensional montmorillonite nanosheets as water-based lubricant additives can effectively reduce the friction and wear of steel/steel worn surfaces.

title: Broadband laser protection and enhanced nonlinear optical response of samarium-metal–organic framework-based white/black carbon hybrids
abstract: The broadband nonlinear optical (NLO) properties of Sm-MOF, Sm-MOF/BN, and Sm-MOF/rGO hybrids have been investigated.

title: Rational design of nickel-based nanostructured catalysts for enhanced electrolytic water splitting efficiency and stability
abstract: A mechanochemical ball-milling and calcination method constructed NiO/mica with a layered structure and excellent OER activity, achieving 10 mA cm −2 at 270 mV overpotential.

title: Bottlebrush polymer patches template heterometal growth on a gold nanoparticle surface
abstract: We present a new bottlebrush copolymer ligand design to construct robust patches for heterometal deposition on a gold nanoparticle surface.

title: Spontaneous switching and fine structure of donor–acceptor Stenhouse adducts on Au(111)
abstract: We disclose the self-assembly and evolution of DASA monolayers on a gold surface, as observed using scanning tunneling microscopy (STM).

title: First principles investigation of hydrogen passivation for selective atomic layer deposition of Pt, Cu, and Au metals
abstract: This study uses DFT to show that hydrogen passivation raises energy barriers for Pt, Cu, and Au ALD on silicon, suggesting selective deposition. Gold shows the largest barrier shift; platinum has the most controlled pathways.

title: Stacking dependent piezoelectric response of bilayer and heterobilayer group-IV monochalcogenides under applied external strain
abstract: The piezoelectric response of group-IV monochalcogenide bilayers under applied strain was investigated for applications in piezoelectric energy harvesters.

title: Sustainable nanomanufacturing: two-dimensional materials transfer using a bioderived and biodegradable supportive polymer
abstract: Poly-angelica lactone supporting polymer is removed by yeast, enabling clean 2D materials transfer.

title: Fluorinated metal–organic frameworks: hydrophobic nanospaces with high fluorine density and proton conductivity
abstract: The current work revealed the relationship between the fluorine density of organic-based porous materials and water dynamics in the hydrophobic nanospace.

title: Guided mode resonance-driven photoluminescence enhancement and angular emission control in a 2D dielectric photonic lattice
abstract: Utilizing fluorescent emitters with precisely designed nanostructures to regulates their emission characteristics, which has great potential in light-emitting devices, biosensing, and quantum technologies.

title: Carbon nanofibre frameworks based on a π-extended oligo(perylene) diimide for high-rate lithium-ion batteries
abstract: Carbon nanofiber frameworks can be fabricated by the self-assembly of a π-extended oligo(perylene) diimide in the carbonization process. As an anode for lithium-ion batteries, it has excellent performance.

title: Correction: Camptothecin-based prodrug nanomedicines for cancer therapy
abstract: Correction for ‘Camptothecin-based prodrug nanomedicines for cancer therapy’ by Renshuai Zhang et al. , Nanoscale , 2023, 15 , 17658–17697, https://doi.org/10.1039/D3NR04147F.

title: Impact of free valence electron contraction on the optical and electrocatalytic properties of nanoclusters: based on M 1 Ag 14 (M = Pt/Pd) series nanoclusters
abstract: Isostructural Pt1Ag14 (FE C 1 = 40.8%, PLQY = 5.7%) and Pd1Ag14 (FE C 1 = 81.4%, PLQY = 0.1%) nanoclusters exhibit inverse catalysis-photoluminescence correlations.

title: The role and electrochemical behavior of high-valence Mo cations doped in LiNi 0.8 Co 0.15 Al 0.05 O 2
abstract: A simple doping modification strategy using Mo 6+ is proposed for NCA, and it improves the Li + transport kinetics, enhances the interfacial and bulk-phase stability, and increases the migration barrier of Ni 2+ from TM sites to Li sites.

title: A strategy for realizing van der Waals Josephson junction arrays
abstract: This article demonstrates a fabrication strategy to realize van der Waals Josephson junction arrays with uniform junction thickness and twist angle. A double Josephson junction device exhibiting Josephson diode effect is demonstrated.

title: Insights into the copolymerization of metal–organic nanotubes from ligand mixtures using small angle neutron scattering
abstract: Small angle neutron scattering was employed to investigate the mechanism of copolymerization of metal-organic nanotubes.

title: Enhanced thermoelectric performance of (Ta 1− x Mo x ) 4 SiTe 4 /polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) organic–inorganic flexible thermoelectric composite films
abstract: A series of (Ta 1− x Mo x ) 4 SiTe 4 /PVDF composite films were prepared by carefully tuning the Mo doping concentration. The resultant films exhibited optimized thermoelectric performance, which was more than double that of the undoped composite film.

title: Exploring the electronic and mechanical properties of the recently synthesized nitrogen-doped amorphous monolayer carbon
abstract: A recently synthesized amorphous monolayer carbon and its analogous systems doped with 10% nitrogen atoms (for which synthesis has also been reported), along with its doping limit of 35% nitrogen atoms.

title: AuCu bimetallic nanocluster-modified titania nanotubes for photoelectrochemical water splitting: composition-dependent atomic arrangement and activity
abstract: The relationship between the atomic-level structure and the photoelectrochemical water splitting reaction of Au x Cu 1− x nanoalloys on titania nanotubes photoanodes was investigated.

title: From Co to Co@Co 2 P and CoP nanorods: synthesis and performances in selective hydrogenation of phenylacetylene
abstract: Topochemical phosphidization of Co nanorods gives access to Co@Co 2 P and CoP nanorods, catalytically active and selective in the phenylacetylene semi-hydrogenation. Increasing the catalyst P-content improves both activity and selectivity to styrene.

title: Preparation and characterization of zein-based nano-assembled bioadhesive coatings for prolonged gastrointestinal retention of sinapine
abstract: Complex condensates based on zein can adhere to the intestine and prolong the residence time of sinapine.

title: Proper aggregation of Pt is beneficial for the epoxidation of styrene by O 2 over Pt x /γ-Al 2 O 3 catalysts
abstract: The dispersion of metal catalysts has multiple effects on catalytic performance, and higher dispersions do not necessarily imply better performance.

title: In situ growth of conductive bimetallic catecholate MOFs on porous graphene for high-performance formaldehyde gas sensing
abstract: High-performance chemoresistive gas sensors capable of rapidly detecting and identifying formaldehyde, a probable carcinogenic volatile organic compound (VOC), are essential for numerous applications, especially for monitoring indoor air quality.

title: A high-performance broadband polarization-sensitive photodetector based on BiSeS nanowires
abstract: BiSeS nanowire exhibit remarkable photoresponse and polarization angle sensitivity over a broadband wavelength region ranging from 254 nm to 1064 nm.

title: Controlling Raman enhancement in particle–aperture hybrid nanostructures by interlayer spacing
abstract: Varying the spacing between layers of aligned metal nanoparticles and apertures enables control over the coupling strength of their plasmon resonances and therefore the overall field enhancement.

title: Solvation structure regulation of zinc ions with nitrogen-heterocyclic additives for advanced batteries
abstract: The coordination and electrode–electrolyte interface microenvironment of zinc ions have been effectively regulated using poly-nitrogen heterocyclic compounds as electrolyte additives, achieving long reversible cycling of zinc batteries.

title: Metallic 2D Janus SNbSe layers driven by a structural phase change
abstract: Synthesis of 2D metallic Janus SNbSe and SeNbS in 1T phase from 1H-phase NbS 2 and NbSe 2 , respectively, is achieved through using a room temperature plasma-assisted technique that induces a structural phase transition.

title: Enhancing NiS performance: Na-doping for advanced photocatalytic and electrocatalytic applications
abstract: Alkali metal doping is a new and promising approach to enhance the photo/electrocatalytic activity of NiS-based catalyst systems.
